candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: For the INVERTER shown in the figure. Find the value of $C_s$ for full compensation. For the transistor, $h_{FE(\min)}$ = 60 $r_{b'e}$ = 1200$\Omega$, $C_i$ = 100pF, $V_{BE(ON)}$ = 0.7V, $V_{\text{sat}}$ = 0.2V. $V_i$ = 6V when on.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 对于给定的逆变器电路图,求全额补偿电容 $C_S$ 的值。已知晶体管参数:最小正向电流传输比 $h_{fe(min)}=60$、基极-发射极电阻 $r_{b'e}=1200\Omega$、输入电容 $c_i=100\text{pF}$、基极-发射极开启电压 $v_{be(on)}=0.7\text{V}$、饱和电压 $V_{\text{SAT}}=0.2\text{V}$。输入电压 $v_i=6\text{V}$ 时求解。
